ns0:entry.ns0:title: anthropics/claude-code
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code
Language: shell
Claude Code is an agentic coding tool that lives in your terminal, understands your codebase, and helps you code faster by executing routine tasks, explaining complex code, and handling git workflows - all through natural language commands.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: armbian/build
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/armbian/build
Language: shell
The official build framework for the Armbian Linux distribution. This repository contains the complete toolchain and scripts required to compile custom OS images from source, including kernel configuration, U-Boot handling, and board-specific tweaks for various ARM and ARM64 single-board computers.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: eugr/spark-vllm-docker
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/eugr/spark-vllm-docker
Language: shell
Docker configuration for running VLLM on dual DGX Sparks

ns0:entry.ns0:title: githubnext/monaspace
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/githubnext/monaspace
Language: shell
An innovative superfamily of fonts for code

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mylinuxforwork/dotfiles
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mylinuxforwork/dotfiles
Language: shell
The ML4W OS - Dotfiles for Hyprland - An advanced and full-featured configuration for the dynamic tiling window manager Hyprland. Ready to install from a Live ISO or with the Dotfiles Installer app with setup scripts for Arch Linux, Fedora and openSuse.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: nvm-sh/nvm
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/nvm-sh/nvm
Language: shell
Node Version Manager - POSIX-compliant bash script to manage multiple active node.js versions

ns0:entry.ns0:title: obra/superpowers
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/obra/superpowers
Language: shell
An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ohmyzsh/ohmyzsh
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ohmyzsh/ohmyzsh
Language: shell
🙃 A delightful community-driven (with 2,400+ contributors) framework for managing your zsh configuration. Includes 300+ optional plugins (rails, git, macOS, hub, docker, homebrew, node, php, python, etc), 140+ themes to spice up your morning, and an auto-update tool that makes it easy to keep up with the latest updates from the community.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ophub/amlogic-s9xxx-armbian
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ophub/amlogic-s9xxx-armbian
Language: shell
Supports running Armbian on Amlogic, Allwinner, and Rockchip devices. Support a311d, s922x, s905x3, s905x2, s912, s905d, s905x, s905w, s905, s905l, rk3588, rk3568, rk3399, rk3328, h6, etc.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ophub/fnnas
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ophub/fnnas
Language: shell
Supports running FnNAS on Amlogic, Allwinner, and Rockchip devices. Support a311d, s922x, s905x3, s905x2, s912, s905d, s905x, s905w, s905, s905l, rk3588, rk3568, rk3399, rk3328, h6, etc.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: termux/termux-packages
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/termux/termux-packages
Language: shell
A package build system for Termux.
